creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nicholas Riley from comment #13)
It would be useful to have more details on your configuration, yes.

I know what the problem is here, but the full fix is non-trivial and will take a while to put in place (as in, it likely won't be there for 11.0).

Perhaps I can offer a workaround, or improve the situation for your case though.
